_meta.description: Database tables: which migration defines them, primary key, foreign keys, and owning contract. For targeted loading use .ai/db-map/index.json → .ai/db-map/<domain-slug>.json.

migrations.description: PostgreSQL extensions (pgvector, pg_trgm, btree_gist, uuid-ossp, pgcrypto) and all ENUM types
Core system tables - departments, users, roles, user_roles, sessions, audit_events (partitioned)
Document management tables - documents, document_versions, document_embeddings, document_distribution
Form system tables - form_schemas, form_entries, form_attachments
Record management tables - record_counters, records, record_links
ERP master data - items, item_revisions, bill_of_materials, bom_components, routings, routing_operations, work_centers
Customer and sales tables - customers, sales_orders, sales_order_lines
Vendor and purchasing tables - vendors, purchase_orders, purchase_order_lines, vendor_ratings
Inventory tables - warehouses, inventory_locations, inventory_transactions, lot_master, serial_master
Production tables - job_orders, job_operations, labor_transactions, production_schedule

Quality tables - inspection_plans, inspection_results, spc_data, ncr_records, capa_records, fai_records, fai_characteristics, certificates, npi_projects, ehs_incidents, contamination_checks, engineering_change_requests
Calibration and equipment tables - equipment, calibration_records, maintenance_work_orders, tools, tool_transactions
Training and HR tables - employees, training_records, skills_matrix, employee_certifications
Audit and risk tables - audits, audit_findings, audit_actions, risk_register, improvement_projects, management_reviews
Finance tables - cost_elements, job_costing, gl_transactions, ap_ar_invoices
Shipping and compliance tables - shipments, shipment_packages, compliance_records, export_licenses
Subcontracting and RMA tables - subcontract_orders, subcontract_receipts, rma_orders
Project management and KPI tables - projects, project_milestones, project_resources, kpi_definitions, kpi_snapshots, mrp_planned_orders
System tables - variable_registry, naming_patterns, notifications, file_attachments, tags, comments, workflow_definitions, workflow_instances
ALL indexes - B-tree, GIN, GiST, trigram, ivfflat across all tables
ALL views - active documents, open NCRs, overdue calibrations, open CAPAs, job status, expiring certs, overdue records, vendor scorecard
ALL functions, triggers, and stored procedures - generate_record_id, bitemporal_update, calculate_rpn, set_updated_at, audit_event_logger
ALL Row Level Security policies - department-based access control for records, documents, forms, NCR, CAPA, job orders
ALL seed data - departments, roles, naming patterns, KPI definitions, record counters
